promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not treat this reduction as active A2 control memory, as a settled trigram doctrine, or as authority to promote Thread A, B-side evidence grammar, correlation-first commentary, or late symbolic axis grouping into kernel law from this batch alone.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the prior live-ledger audit nominated this parent as the strongest still-unchilded source-bearing big-doc after archive-root packaged closure.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent already isolates the exact split that matters now: the file is not one trigram spec but a stacked transcript containing Thread A outer-interface material, B-side admission and evidence discipline, late correlation-first commentary, and an active axis and trigram repair tail.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The branchthread child was used to preserve source-bound anti-contamination and throughput-vs-movement audit pressure, the apple-axis child was used to preserve term-conflict and anti-drift handling for late axis cleanup, and the Thread A outer-interface child was used to preserve noncanon routing and provenance-gate patterns below canon overread.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because the parent's first reduction need is to preserve the whole multilineage split before collapsing the file into only the late axis tail.
Deferred because the GPT trigram file had cleaner bounded seams and stronger nearby comparison anchors for immediate re-entry.
Deferred because the replay-heavy mixed transcript remains less bounded for the immediate next pass.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent source map, distillates, tensions, and candidate summaries already isolate the needed seams for this reduction, and the comparison-anchor children provide enough bounded structure to avoid reopening raw transcript lines in this pass.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the cleanest reusable packets from the parent: multilineage split, useful-but-noncanon Thread A interface role, B-side evidence and admission seam, anti-overread proof boundary, late correlation-first foundation residue, and the repaired axis-trigram tail as lineage rather than canon.

The parent file is strong enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them.
